Avignon

Les Angles

The view, the pines, the heated pool.
5guests
2bedrooms
1heated pool
✓air conditioning
+ 1 photos

On the hillsides of Les Angles, facing Avignon and the Rhône valley, this bright contemporary gîte opens onto a striking panorama — especially at sunset, from the heated pool.

White, sage and pale wood, two bedrooms and a sofa bed in a connecting room, terraces under the pines: a natural cocoon five minutes from the Pont d’Avignon, to breathe while staying at the gates of the City of the Popes.
